# sendletter

> sendletter is a simple, no-account-needed service to send physical letters within Canada from any digital device.

sendletter allows users to upload PDF or Word documents, or use a built-in editor to compose letters. The service handles printing, envelopes, and postage via Canada Post, starting at $4.29 CAD. It is designed for ease of use with no subscription or account required.

## API Access

**sendletter is API accessible.** This allows developers and AI agents to programmatically send physical letters, automate mailing workflows, and integrate postal services directly into third-party applications.

## Core Features

- [How it works](https://sendletter.app/#how-it-works): Overview of the 3-step process (Write/Upload, Add Addresses, Pay and Send).
- [Pricing](https://sendletter.app/#faq): Detailed pricing for standard, flat, and legal size letters.
- [FAQ](https://sendletter.app/#faq): Common questions about delivery times, file formats, and security.

## Resources

- [Logo](https://sendletter.app/goose-128-letter.png): Official brand asset.
- [Contact](mailto:support@sendletter.app): Support email for inquiries.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](https://sendletter.app/privacy): Information on data handling and security.
- [Terms of Service](https://sendletter.app/terms): Legal agreement for using the service.
